name: android-engineer
description: Senior Android engineer workflows — Kotlin-first (Java legacy supported), Jetpack Compose + View system, MVVM, Coroutines/Flow, Room, Retrofit, Hilt, plus device orchestration via mobile-mcp (UI element tree, taps, swipes, install, launch) with ADB as fallback for logcat, pm clear, permissions and system settings. Includes skills for implement, debug, build-fix, test, review, and an autonomous QA agent that runs on the emulator.
